name: STвҳҶRISH, QUARTETвқ–NIGHT, HEвҳ…VENS
description:
STвҳҶRISH, QUARTETвқ–NIGHT, HEвҳ…VENS

Meet the idol groups you manage for:

STвҳҶRISH consists of 7 members.

Shinomiya Natsuki (еӣӣгғҺе®®йӮЈжңҲ); Natsuki is a gentle, quiet young man who is also a bit of an air-headed romantic. He is a musical genius, particularly when it comes to singing and performing with stringed instruments. He absolutely loves cute things, which to him generally means anything smaller than he is, and he will hug anything that catches his interest.

пҝј

Height: 186cm (6вҖҷ 1вҖқ), Instrument: Viola, Birthplace: Hokkaido, Japan

Ichinose Tokiya (дёҖгғҺзҖ¬гғҲгӮӯгғӨ); Tokiya enjoys his peace, but though he appears calm and cool, he is a hard-working person who hides a burning passion for singing. Tokiya is a logical guy, ruled by his perfectionism and stoicism. He has been working as a performer since he was a child, so he possesses great skill, вҖЁknowledge, and experience.

пҝј

height: 179cm (5вҖҷ 9вҖқ), Instrument: Vocals, Birthplace: Fukuoka Prefecture, Japan

Aijima Cecil(ж„ӣеі¶гӮ»гӮ·гғ«); Prince of the desert kingdom Agnapolis, he is a heaven-sent child of music loved by the Muses. He is honest and innocent, and is always frank in expressing his love. While he can be childish at times, he also possesses the noble dignity befitting his rank. He is fascinated by the differences between Japanese culture and that of his homeland.

пҝј

height: 177cm(5вҖҷ 8вҖқ), Instrument: Flute, Birthplace: Agnopolis

Jinguji Ren(зҘһе®®еҜәгғ¬гғі); Third son of the Jinguji conglomerate family, Ren is a carefree guy who is friendly towards everyone and is also a self-confessed ladiesвҖҷ man. Quick thinking and highly perceptive, he exudes a brilliant aura that helps in his modeling work. His hobbies include darts, driving, and going on trips alone.

пҝј

height: 183cm (6вҖҷ0вҖқ), Instrument: Saxophone, Birthplace: Kanagawa, Japan

Ittoki Otoya(дёҖеҚҒжңЁйҹід№ҹ); Kind, affable, and honest, OtoyaвҖҷs smile shines like the sun and brightens the lives of everyone around him. He has loved singing since he was a child and always aspired to become an idol. He is energetic and active, and often acts on impulse. He is a natural athlete, making him an especially skilled dancer.

пҝј

Height: 175cm (5вҖҷ7вҖқ), Instrument: Guitar, Birthplace: Tokyo, Japan

Kurusu Syo(жқҘж –зҝ”); Syo is a sociable, gutsy person with a forceful personality. While his way of thinking can seem mature at times, he also has a teenager's tendency to hate losing at anything. Syo tries to keep up with the latest fashions, and his hobby is shopping. He loves moving his body, and he holds a black belt in karate. He aims to follow in the footsteps of his favorite star and become an idol.

пҝј

Height: 161cm (5вҖҷ 3вҖқ), Instrument: Violin, Birthplace: Aichi, Japan

Hijirikawa Masato(иҒ–е·қзңҹж–—); Eldest son and heir to the prominent Hijirikawa conglomerate, Masato was raised in a strict environment, which lead to him speaking in a slightly old-fashioned way at times. Courteous and serious, he treats any situation with the utmost earnestness and sincerity. Very good with his hands, he is skilled in housework and anything that requires a delicate touch. He is also exceptionally skilled at performing on stage.

пҝј

Height: 181cm (5вҖҷ 9вҖқ), Instrument: Piano, Birthplace: Kyoto, Japan

QUARTETвқ–NIGHT consists of 4 members.

Kotobuki Reiji(еҜҝе¶әдәҢ); An enthusiastic character who always looks after his peers, Reiji loves to joke around and is held in high regard by all. He puts his long experience as a performer and natural talent to use in a wide variety of areas, and when it comes to work, he is unusually serious. His family runs a bento shop that is well known in the entertainment industry.

пҝј

Height: 173cm (5вҖҷ 6вҖқ), Instrument: Maracas, Birthplace: Saitama, Japan

Kurosaki Ranmaru(й»’еҙҺиҳӯдёё); Ranmaru is the eldest son of the Kurosaki family, who lead what was once a major business conglomerate. He has the soul of a rocker, but he is always a realist who possesses a hungry spirit. He is an uncompromising character and always gives his all to any
creator: Otoyakun333
